calendar.matters:
Hearing On Petition For Consolidation Of Related Arbitraton Proceedings Per Ccp §1281.3
Off Calendar May-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. petitioner michael abbruscato'sPetition For Consolidation Of Related Arbitration Proceedings Per CCP 1281.3 is Off calendar per request of moving party. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Hearing On Petition For Consolidation Of Related Arbitraton Proceedings Per Ccp §1281.3
Off Calendar Apr-18-2013 Continued To May-02-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. THE Hearing On Petition For Consolidation Of Related Arbitraton Proceedings Per CCP 1281.3 IS Continued to May 2, 2013 per the request of the moving party. The parties are in the process of settling this motion. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Hearing On Petition For Consolidation Of Related Arbitraton Proceedings Per Ccp §1281.3
Off Calendar Mar-19-2013 Continued To Apr-18-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brady R. Dewar, Esq. of Kerr & Wagstaffe, Tel. 415.371.8500, for petitioners and moving party;
Michelle Heverly, Esq. of Littler Mendelson, Tel. 408.795.3406, for respondents and opposing party.

RULING: Parties represented to the court that they are in the process of settling the matter and requested the court for a continuance of this hearing. The Court granted the request and continued the Hearing On Petition For Consolidation Of Related Arbitration Proceedings Per CCP 1281.3 to April 18, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
